scheme_name: PMMSY: Installation of Cages in Reservoirs Scheme - Haryana
page_title: PMMSY: Installation of Cages in Reservoirs Scheme - Haryana

details: The "Installation of Cages in Reservoirs Scheme" was launched by the Ministry Of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Government of India, under the umbrella scheme "Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana". It aims to promote sustainable aquaculture practices by supporting cage fish farming in water bodies. Under this scheme, a grant of ₹3,00,000/- per unit to the individuals and groups for setting up cage fish farms, thereby encouraging entrepreneurship, increasing fish production, and generating employment.
benefits: 40% of unit cost for General Category beneficiaries.
60% of unit cost for Scheduled Caste/Women beneficiaries.
Up to 5 cages for individual farmers.
Up to 20 cages for registered cooperative societies/self-help groups/joint liability groups (with at least 10 members).
eligibility: The applicant should be an individual farmer, cooperative society, self-help group, or joint liability group.
The cooperative society, self-help group, or joint liability group having a minimum of 10 members.
The applicant must possess a Family Identity Card (Parivar Pehchan Patra).
The applicant must obtain prior permission from the Government of Haryana and competent authorities.
The cage location must have year-round water availability and a minimum of 8 meters depth.
The applicant should take government permission for rearing exotic fish species.

online: For registration, click on “New User/Register Here” and fill in all the mandatory details,i.e., Name, Email ID, Mobile Number & password. Click on ‘Submit’.
Verify the OTP received in the provided Email and Mobile Number. Alternatively, click on the Verification Link to activate the profile.
Login to Apply for the Scheme:
The “Sign in here” option is available on the right side of the screen. Fill in the required credentials and click on the ‘Login’ button.
In the opened window, click on “Scheme/Services list”, and a list of schemes will appear on the screen.
Now, select the scheme and click on “Apply for Service/Scheme”.
Fill in all the details in the online application form and click on "Submit".
Type 'SARAL' and send it to 9954699899 to track your application.
Type SARAL<space><Application ID/Ticket No.> and send to 9954699899 to track your application/ticket.

documents_required: Agreement 1 (agreement deed between the beneficiary and the fisheries Department).
Date of Birth Certificate (Voting Card/Birth Certificate/Aadhar Card/Matriculation Certificate).
Land Record (Land record from Tehsil (own land- Jamabandi, Nakal, Akshizra, Farad) or registered lease deed of minimum 7 years.
An undertaking that no other government assistance has been availed for the project.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: An individual farmer, cooperative societies, self-help groups, or joint liability groups with a Family Identity Card and a valid DPR for cage farming.

faqs.question: How much financial assistance is available?
faqs.answer: ₹3,00,000/- per cage unit; 40% subsidy for General, 60% for SC/Women.

faqs.question: What is the maximum number of cages one can get support for?
Do I need permission from the government to set up cages?
faqs.answer: Yes, prior approval from the state government is mandatory.

faqs.question: Can I apply if I’ve received similar assistance from another scheme?
faqs.answer: No, the project must not have received assistance from any other government scheme.

faqs.question: Is there any special provision for women?
faqs.answer: Yes, women beneficiaries get 60% subsidy support.

faqs.question: What is the application fee charge by the government?
faqs.answer: No application fee is charged by the government.

faqs.question: Where do I apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Submit the application at the local District Fisheries Office or Antyodaya SARAL portal.

faqs.question: Is the scheme applicable for exotic fish farming?
faqs.answer: Yes, but prior permission from the government is mandatory.

faqs.question: What documents are required for the application?
faqs.answer: Family Identity Card, DPR, permission letters, and training certificate.
